title: K-200 Propulsion Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-424-C. Revision: C. Type: specification. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2025-04-05. Last modified: 2025-09-03. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1151, P-1177.
